# Kealee PM + Staffing Module

## Purpose
A nationwide, managed execution module that allows GCs, builders, and contractors to focus on **onsite superintendent and field leadership**, while Kealee handles **coordination, staffing, paperwork, vendors, bids, permits, closeout, and warranty execution**. This module generates immediate recurring revenue and directly funds the Kealee platform build.

---

# 1. MODULE OVERVIEW (WHAT IT IS)

### What the Module Does
- Provides **managed PM + back-office execution** using trained remote staff
- Integrates subcontractor/vendor onboarding, bid support, permit tracking, and warranty management
- Operates manually first, then migrates into the Kealee platform
- Designed for **$1M–$10M revenue GCs/builders/contractors** (majority of industry), but scalable upward

### What Makes It Different
- Not staffing only
- Not software only
- **Managed execution + SOPs + accountability**
- Platform-ready workflows
- Includes **free leads + contract execution** when Kealee platform is live

---

# 2. ROLES, RESPONSIBILITIES & EXECUTION (HOW IT WORKS)

## Roles Provided
1. PM Assistant (Remote)
2. Scheduler / Coordinator
3. Estimator Support
4. Admin & Compliance Support
5. Sales / CRM Support

### Expanded Functional Capabilities
- Main subcontractor & vendor list creation
- Sub/vendor onboarding (W-9, COI, licenses as provided)
- Optional bid package creation and tracking
- Optional permit submission and approval tracking
- Contract execution support
- Warranty intake, tracking, and execution management

---

## Project Lifecycle Responsibilities

### A. Project Start (Preconstruction)
**GC / Builder Responsibilities**
- Provide scope, plans, specs, contract status
- Identify preferred subs/vendors
- Make all award and pricing decisions

**Kealee Responsibilities**
- Project setup and workspace creation
- Build vendor/sub list by trade
- Onboard subs/vendors
- Assemble bid packages (optional)
- Track permits and approvals (optional)

---

### B. Project Execution (Office ↔ Site Interface)

**Core Rule**: Kealee runs coordination and documentation. GC runs the field.

**Onsite (GC / Superintendent)**
- Daily field supervision
- Safety, QA/QC, code compliance
- Real-time sequencing decisions
- Sub performance onsite

**Offsite (Kealee Module)**
- Daily task tracking and follow-ups
- Schedule updates and alerts
- RFI and submittal logging
- Vendor coordination (non-field)
- Compliance tracking
- Weekly reporting

**Information Flow**
- Site → Kealee: photos, notes, inspection results
- Kealee → Site: action lists, schedule alerts, missing items

---

### C. Project Closeout
**GC / Builder**
- Punch completion
- Final inspections

**Kealee**
- Closeout checklist tracking
- Warranty and manual collection
- As-built and document organization
- Final invoice support

---

### D. Warranty Period
**Included in All Packages (Base)**
- Warranty intake
- Documentation
- Tracking

**Full Warranty Execution (Scheduling, Homeowner Comms)**
- Included in Packages C & D
- Optional add-on for A & B

---

# 3. PRICING, REVENUE MODEL & ROI

## Monthly Packages (Nationwide)

### Package A – Field-First Starter
- PM Assistant
- Vendor/sub list setup
- Weekly reporting
- **$1,750–$2,750 / month**

### Package B – Schedule & Paperwork Control
- PM Assistant
- Scheduler
- Admin & Compliance
- Vendor onboarding
- **$3,750–$5,500 / month**

### Package C – Bid-to-Build Execution
- Roles 1–4
- Bid package support
- Permit tracking (lite)
- Full warranty execution
- **$6,500–$9,500 / month**

### Package D – Full Back Office + Growth
- All Roles (1–5)
- Full vendor & bid management
- Permit tracking
- CRM & follow-ups
- Priority platform access
- **$10,500–$16,500 / month**

---

## A La Carte Pricing
- PM Assistant: $1,750–$4,000
- Scheduler: $1,250–$3,500
- Estimator Support: $1,500–$4,500
- Admin & Compliance: $1,250–$3,500
- Sales / CRM: $1,250–$3,500
- Bid Packages: $750–$2,500 per project
- Permit Tracking: $500–$1,500 per project

---

## Financial Model (12-Month Summary)
- Avg revenue/client/month: ~$5,200
- Avg gross margin: ~48%
- Month-12 run rate: ~$312k/month
- Year-1 revenue (ramp): ~$1.9M–$2.2M
- Year-1 gross profit: ~$900k–$1.05M

---

## % of Project Cost
- Small–Mid projects: ~1–4% of project value
- Larger projects: ~1–2.5%
- Supports ~70–85% of non-physical execution work

---

# 4. BUILD PLAN – START IMMEDIATELY (NO PLATFORM REQUIRED)

## Phase 1: MVP Execution Stack (Weeks 1–2)
- GoHighLevel (CRM, pipelines, invoicing, automations)
- ClickUp or Monday (tasks, SOPs, reporting)
- Google Drive (document control)
- Make/Zapier (automation)
- Airtable (staffing bench & assignments)

## Phase 2: Revenue First (Weeks 1–8)
- Sell packages manually
- Execute SOPs
- Generate recurring cash
- Fund platform build

## Phase 3: Kealee Platform Integration (Month 3+)
- Migrate workflows into platform
- Add staffing module UI
- Add warranty module automation
- Enable free leads + contract execution

---

# STRATEGIC OUTCOME
- Immediate cash flow
- Platform funded by operations
- Staffing tied to execution (not headcount)
- High-margin recurring revenue engine
- Defensible moat vs VAs or PM software

---

## STATUS: READY TO BUILD
This module can be sold and delivered **immediately** using the MVP stack, while remaining fully compatible with the future Kealee platform architecture.
